metaData.Key Information: Panadol Extra with Optizorb provides 37% stronger pain relief for bad headache, migraine, toothache, muscle and joint pain. Using a new disintegrant technology, it starts to work in 10 minutes to relieve tough pain, while being gentle on the stomach.
metaData.Preparation:
• For adults, elderly and children (12 years and above): Take 1 - 2 caplets for every 4 - 6 hours as required
• Important:
1. Do not take more than 8 caplets in 24 hours
2. Do not exceed the stated dose and do not take more frequently than every 4 hours
3. Do not take with any other products containing Paracetamol
4. Do not give to children under 12 years old

metaData.Key Information:
Zyrtec-R fast relief of cold and allergy symptoms:
• Runny
• Itchy nose
• Sneezing
• Watery
• Itchy eyes
• Itchy skin rash
metaData.Preparation:
• For children aged 6 - 12 years:
Take half of the tablet daily
• For adults aged 12 years and above:
Take 1 tablet once daily
• Note:
1. Half of the tablet starting dose may be used if this leads to satisfactory control of the symptoms
2. Do not take more than 10mg of tablet in 24 hours

product.description:
Benefits of Panadol Cough & Cold Caplets
• Non-drowsy, multi-ingredient formula that relieves symptoms of cold and flu
• Pain-relieving and fever-reducing actions, relieve nasal congestion and chesty cough
• Provide relief for cough, blocked nose, sore throat, fever, headache, body ache, sinus pain and shiver

metaData.Key Information:
PANADOL Cough & Cold provides non-drowsy, fast and effective relief of 8 cold and flu symptoms in 1 dose*, including: wet chesty cough, fever, sore throat, blocked nose, sinus pain, headache, body ache and shivers. It starts to work in 30 minutes.

The 2-in-1 formulation (Phenylephrine Hydrochloride + Guaiphenesin) helps relieve nasal congestion, and thin and loosen phlegm and mucus that cause chest congestion for chesty coughs. Each tablet also contains the trusted pain and fever reliever of Panadol, (250mg paracetamol).

*1 dose refers to the maximum dose per intake as stated in approved labelling; always read label before use.

PM-SG-PAN-23-00029
metaData.Preparation:
Adults (including the elderly) and children aged 12 years and over: Take 2 caplets every 4 hours. Do not take more than 8 caplets in 24 hours. Do not take for more than 5 days.

Children aged 6 to under 12 years: Take 1 caplet every 4 hours, do not take more than 4 caplets in 24 hours. Do not take for more than 3 days.

For oral use only.

Children under 6 years: Not recommended.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool, dry place

product.name: Panadol Cough & Cold

metaData.Ingredients:
Paracetamol 500mg and Phenylphrine HCI 5mg
• Contains potassium sorbate as preservative
metaData.Key Information:
• Non drowsy
• Fast and effective relief for blocked nose, fever, body aches or other associated pains
metaData.Preparation:
• Dosage:
For Adult (Including elderly and children over 12 years):
Take 2 caplets with water for every 4 to 6 hours as needed
For Children Under 12 Years:
Not recommended, except on the advice of a doctor
• Important:
1. For oral use only
2. Do not take more frequently than every 4 hours
3. Do not take more than 8 caplets per day
4. If symptoms persist after 5 days, seek medical advice
5. Do not use if allergic to paracetamol and/or Phenylephrine HCI or any other ingredients in the product
6. Do not take with any other products containing Paracetamol and/of Phenylephrine Hydrochloride, or other medicines for the relief of cough and cold, congestion or blocked nose
7. Read the leaflet carefully before taking the product
metaData.Storage Information:
• Store below 30°C
• Keep out of sight and reach of children

metaData.sapReference: FREEGIFT Buy 2 Panadol FREE Puffy Travel Pouch 0626

metaData.Ingredients:
Carboxymethylcellulose sodium, Calcium Chloride, Magnesium Chloride, Potassium Chloride, Purified Water, Sodium Chloride, and Sodium Lactate
• May contain hydrochloric acid and/or sodium hydroxide to adjust pH
metaData.Key Information:
• Provides immediate, long-lasting relief plus protection from dryness and irritation
• Protects against further irritation with its long-lasting lubricant
• Preservative free
• Provides 24 hour comfort for dry, irritated eyes
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
1. Completely twist off tab, do not pull off
2. Instill 1 or 2 drops in the affected eye(s) and discard container
• Warnings:
1. To avoid contamination, do not touch tip of container on to any surface
2. Do not touch unit-does tip to eye
3. Do not reuse, once opened, discard
4. Stop usage and ask a doctor if you experience eye pain, changes in vision, continued redness or irritation of the eye, or if the condition worsens or persists for more than 72 hours
5. Do not use in case of hypersensitivity to one or more of the ingredients
6. Use only if single-use container is intact
7. Do not use if solution changes color or becomes cloudy

metaData.Key Information:
• Panadol Extra with Optizorb technology disintegrates up to 5 times faster than standard paracetamol tablets*
• Panadol Extra with Optizorb technology fights 10 types of tough pain**

*In comparison to paracetamol & caffeine formulation without Optizorb technology
**10 types of pain indicate headache, migraine, backache, joint pain, muscle pain, period pain, toothache, pain following dental procedure/tooth extraction, pain after vaccination, and sore throat. Individual response might vary.

product.description:
Tablets for heartburn and indigestion
This product is chewable tablets
Peppermint tablets brings relief from the pain and discomfort of heartburn and acid indigestion
This tablets neutralising excess stomach acid to relieve discomfort
Forming a protective barrier over the stomach contents to soothe that burning pain in your chest.

metaData.Ingredients: Sodium Alginate, Sodium Bicarbonate, Calcium Carbonate
metaData.Key Information:
• Fast Relief: Gaviscon liquid provides fast acting heartburn relief and indigestion relief
• Lasts for Hours
• How It Works: - Relieves heartburn and indigestion by neutralizing excess stomach acid - Forms a protective barrier over the stomach contents to keep stomach acid in the stomach to ensure quickest pain relief
metaData.Preparation:
For oral admission
Adults and children over 12 years: When symptoms occur take two to four tablets after meals and at bedtime, up to four times a day
Chew thoroughly before swallowing
Children under 12 years: Not to be given unless recommended by your doctor
metaData.SAP Product Name: GAVISCON DOUBLE ACTION TABLETS - HEARTBURN & INDIGESTION
metaData.Storage Information:
Do not store above 30°C
Store in the original package
Keep out of reach and sight of children
